question: Will Iran sink a US Navy vessel (surface or submarine) before June 1st 2026?
reason: No credible reports confirm Iran sinking a U.S.
evidence: On May 4, 2026, U.S. Central Command denied Iranian claims of missile strikes on U.S. warships in the Strait of Hormuz. ([navytimes.com](https://www.navytimes.com/news/your-military/2026/05/04/us-denies-iranian-reports-of-strike-on-warship-says-ships-transit-hormuz/?utm_source=openai))

On May 7, 2026, U.S. forces intercepted Iranian attacks on three Navy ships in the Strait of Hormuz, but no vessels were sunk. ([stripes.com](https://www.stripes.com/theaters/middle_east/2026-05-07/us-forces-iran-missiles-drones-21606879.html?utm_source=openai))

On May 25, 2026, the U.S. military conducted 'self-defense' strikes in southern Iran targeting missile launch sites and boats, but no U.S. Navy vessels were reported sunk. ([apnews.com](https://apnews.com/article/01a13e9a63ece786a0a7fa4933dbf09b?utm_source=openai))
searchQueries: recent incidents Iran US Navy sinking ship May 2026
